evals.prompt: Automatically segment this text and provide Nature/CNS and sister journal citations, export in Zotero RDF format and HTML visualization: Tumor-associated macrophages promote immune evasion by suppressing cytotoxic T cell activity. Single-cell RNA sequencing reveals cellular heterogeneity in pancreatic cancer.
evals.expected_output: Segments the text, maps each segment to citation candidates, exports references.rdf, and provides an HTML visualization that can download selected references as ENW, RIS, or Zotero RDF.

evals.prompt: Restrict to Nature series only, segment the following passage by length, and give me the text-to-reference correspondence table for insertion into a paper: single-cell RNA sequencing reveals cellular heterogeneity in pancreatic cancer. Spatial transcriptomics further preserves tissue context for interpreting tumor microenvironments.
evals.expected_output: Restricts scope to Nature Portfolio-style journals and produces a segment-reference correspondence table.

evals.prompt: Find flagship Nature/Science/Cell references for: CRISPR screens can identify genetic dependencies in cancer cells. Export RIS for EndNote.
evals.expected_output: Restricts to Nature, Science, and Cell only, treats the claim as a segment, and exports RIS without fabricating missing metadata.

evals.prompt: Give me a Nature series citation export where the user can choose to download ENW, RIS, or Zotero RDF, filter by year first, and check off references.
evals.expected_output: Produces the citation browser HTML with year filters, selectable references, and downloadable ENW/RIS/Zotero RDF exports from the same page.
